creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
The new reports do not support aggregating data that was entered prior to the creation of the report itself. This makes them useless for reports that shall provide accurate figures over time (see https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1103558 for that issue).

The old reports should provide correct figures with the last update to Bugzilla (except for In Progress, see bug 190631).

I'm closing this issue, since we can't solve this, but either have to provide our own reporting or stick to the old charts for now.
